title: clethra obovata
intro: Clethra obovata, also known as the sweet pepperbush or mountain sweet pepperbush, is a shrub or small tree native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clethra obovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Clethra obovata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salves and ointments for topical application.
